allow: Bash(node -e "const {Monitor} = require\(''node-screenshots''\); const m = Monitor.all\(\)[0]; const img = m.captureImageSync\(\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(img\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {Monitor} = require\(''node-screenshots''\); const m = Monitor.all\(\)[0]; const img = m.captureImageSync\(\); console.log\(''PNG size:'', img.toPngSync\(\).length\); console.log\(''JPEG default:'', img.toJpegSync\(\).length\); console.log\(''JPEG 80:'', img.toJpegSync\(80\).length\); console.log\(''JPEG 50:'', img.toJpegSync\(50\).length\); console.log\(''Image size:'', img.width\(\), ''x'', img.height\(\)\)")

Bash(npx tsx -e "const { Monitor } = await import\(''node-screenshots''\); const m = Monitor.all\(\); const p = m.find\(x => x.isPrimary\(\)\) ?? m[0]; console.log\(Object.keys\(p\)\); console.log\(''w:'', p.width, ''h:'', p.height, ''sf:'', p.scaleFactor\); const img = p.captureImageSync\(\); console.log\(''imgW:'', img.width, ''imgH:'', img.height\);")
